expected_behavior: Lookup-table subgrid storage, shared-face geometry/conveyance, areal source/sink volume conversion, and controlled local-inertial/full-momentum coupling match rectangular-channel references and exact volume ledgers.
primary_metrics: volume_rmse_m3; inverse_depth_rmse_m; face_geometry_error_pct; conveyance_error_pct; source_sink_volume_residual_m3; local_inertial_q_error_m2_s; full_momentum_flat_depth_rmse_m; low_friction_volume_residual_m3
acceptance_threshold: storage residual <1e-9 m3, conveyance error <0.1%, coupled mass error <0.1%, flat full-momentum NSE >0.999
